name: vinuni_leadership_enumeration_targets
description: TARGET (F-ENUM, affirmative): 'who have been the Rectors/Hiệu trưởng' must enumerate BOTH Rohit Verma (founding) and Tan Yap Peng (current, 2025). Fails today: D9 makes it safely HEDGE; the affirmative answer needs the leadership-announcement content (E6) + the D8 role/alias table. Move to data/eval/golden/ once those land (flipping the safe-hedge identity_intent case to required-both-names).

cases.question: Who have served as the Rectors (Hiệu trưởng) of VinUniversity over time?
